name: family-todo-app
description: Family Todo App - MCP-powered task management for families

scripts.dev: mkdir -p data && DB_PATH="$PWD/data/app.db" MCP_INTERNAL_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm run dev:all
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev -w @family-todo/frontend & npm run dev -w @family-todo/mcp & wait
scripts.build: npm run build -w @family-todo/db && npm run build -w @family-todo/frontend && npm run build -w @family-todo/mcp
